mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, current_balance, frozen_balance, available_balance, total_recharge, total_consumption, credit_line, status, version, created_time, updated_time, tenant_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bucket_account WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM bucket_account WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE bucket_account SET current_balance = current_balance + #{amount}, available_balance = available_balance + #{amount}, total_recharge = total_recharge + #{amount}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}

UPDATE bucket_account SET current_balance = current_balance - #{amount}, available_balance = available_balance - #{amount}, total_consumption = total_consumption + #{amount}, updated_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE bucket_account SET credit_line = #{creditLine}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE bucket_account SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
